category_sources: source_facts.description says it lints commit messages according to a commit convention; official README says commitlint checks conventional commit format.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is commitlint; official site and GitHub repository use the commitlint name.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official commitlint documentation site; official GitHub README points users to the main website for documentation.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository conventional-changelog/commitlint is linked from commitlint documentation and describes the project as linting commit messages.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists commitlint; source_facts.description and official README describe conventional commit-message linting.
